message:
feat(daemon): add VsockPath to Task for vsock connection

Adds VsockPath field to the Task struct and database schema to store
the path to the vsock UDS (Unix Domain Socket) for each VM. This enables
the daemon to track vsock connection endpoints for tasks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
